glosses.vi: tước đoạt; làm cho ai mất

sentences.target: Tu nous prives de dessert ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty nu pʁiv də dezɛʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu nous prives de dessert ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty nu pʁiv də dezɛʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: You're depriving us of dessert tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche nos dejas sin postre.
translations.de: Du verwehrst uns heute Abend den Nachtisch.
translations.ko: 오늘 저녁엔 우리 디저트를 못 먹게 하네.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今晚不让我们吃甜点。
translations.yue: 你今晚唔畀我哋食甜品。
translations.ru: Ты лишаешь нас десерта сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite você está nos deixando sem sobremesa.
translations.he: אתה לא נותן לנו קינוח הערב.
translations.tr: Bu akşam bizi tatlıdan mahrum bırakıyorsun.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn không cho chúng tôi ăn tráng miệng.
translations.ar: أنت تحرمنا من الحلوى هذه الليلة.
translations.nl: Je laat ons vanavond zonder toetje.
translations.uk: Ти позбавляєш нас десерту сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Ma este megfosztasz minket a desszerttől.
translations.hi: आज रात तुम हमें मिठाई नहीं खाने दे रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du lar oss ikke få dessert i kveld.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu tidak membiarkan kami makan pencuci mulut.
translations.sv: I kväll låter du oss inte få efterrätt.
translations.ro: Ne lipsești de desert în seara asta.
translations.cs: Dnes večer nás ochuzuješ o dezert.
translations.da: Du lader os ikke få dessert i aften.
translations.fi: Tänä iltana jätät meidät ilman jälkiruokaa.
translations.ja: 今夜は私たちにデザートを食べさせてくれない。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject personal pronoun.
1st person plural clitic object pronoun; direct object of 'prives'.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb meaning 'to deprive'.
Preposition introducing the complement denoting the thing deprived.
Common noun; complement of 'de' (thing being withheld).
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir' to form a time adjunct.
Common noun; part of the temporal expression 'ce soir'.

sentences.target: Ça me prive d'une vraie pause.

translations.fr: Ça me prive d'une vraie pause.
translations.en: It deprives me of a real break.
translations.es: Eso me impide tener un descanso de verdad.
translations.de: Das raubt mir eine echte Pause.
translations.it: Questo mi impedisce di fare una vera pausa.
translations.ko: 그것 때문에 제대로 쉬는 시간을 못 가져.
translations.zh-Hans: 这让我没法真正休息一下。
translations.yue: 呢樣嘢令我冇法好好休息。
translations.pt: Isso me impede de ter uma pausa de verdade.
translations.tr: Bu beni gerçek bir moladan mahrum bırakıyor.
translations.vi: Điều đó khiến tôi không có được một khoảng nghỉ thật sự.
translations.nl: Dat ontneemt me een echte pauze.
translations.hi: यह मुझे एक असली ब्रेक से वंचित करता है.
translations.el: Αυτό με στερεί από ένα πραγματικό διάλειμμα.
translations.nb: Det fratar meg en ordentlig pause.
translations.id: Itu membuat saya tidak bisa benar-benar beristirahat.
translations.sv: Det gör att jag inte får en riktig paus.
translations.ro: Asta mă împiedică să am o pauză adevărată.
translations.cs: To mě připravuje o skutečnou pauzu.
translations.da: Det fratager mig en rigtig pause.
translations.ja: それのせいで本当の休憩が取れない。

tokens.explanation: Colloquial 3rd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'prive'.
1st person singular clitic object pronoun; direct object of 'prive'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Elided 'de' before a vowel; introduces the thing deprived.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, determiners 'pause'.
Adjective, feminine singular agreeing with 'pause'.
Common noun; complement of 'de' (thing withheld).

sentences.target: Je refuse de priver mon chien d'eau.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁəfyz də pʁive mɔ̃ ʃjɛ̃ do/

translations.fr: Je refuse de priver mon chien d'eau.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁəfyz də pʁive mɔ̃ ʃjɛ̃ do/
translations.en: I refuse to deprive my dog of water.
translations.es: Me niego a privar a mi perro de agua.
translations.de: Ich weigere mich, meinem Hund Wasser vorzuenthalten.
translations.it: Mi rifiuto di negare l'acqua al mio cane.
translations.ko: 나는 내 강아지에게 물을 안 주는 걸 거부해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我拒绝让我的狗没水喝。
translations.yue: 我拒絕唔畀我隻狗飲水。
translations.ru: Я отказываюсь лишать свою собаку воды.
translations.pt: Eu me recuso a negar água ao meu cachorro.
translations.he: אני מסרב למנוע מהכלב שלי מים.
translations.vi: Tôi từ chối việc không cho con chó của tôi uống nước.
translations.ar: أرفض أن أحرم كلبي من الماء.
translations.nl: Ik weiger mijn hond water te onthouden.
translations.uk: Я відмовляюся позбавляти свою собаку води.
translations.hu: Nem vagyok hajlandó megvonni a vizet a kutyámtól.
translations.hi: मैं अपने कुत्ते को पानी से वंचित करने से इनकार करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Nie zgadzam się pozbawiać mojego psa wody.
translations.el: Αρνούμαι να στερήσω από τον σκύλο μου το νερό.
translations.nb: Jeg nekter å frata hunden min vann.
translations.id: Saya menolak untuk membuat anjing saya kehausan.
translations.sv: Jag vägrar att neka min hund vatten.
translations.ro: Refuz să-mi las câinele fără apă.
translations.cs: Odmítám připravit svého psa o vodu.
translations.da: Jeg nægter at fratage min hund vand.
translations.ja: 私は犬から水を奪うことを拒む。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; control verb taking 'de' + infinitive.
Preposition marking the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'refuse'.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'chien'.
Common noun; direct object of 'priver' (entity being deprived).
Elided 'de' introducing the thing withheld.
Common noun; complement of 'de' (thing withheld).

sentences.target: Nous privons les élèves de sortie.

translations.fr: Nous privons les élèves de sortie.
translations.en: We’re not letting the students go out.
translations.es: No dejamos salir a los alumnos.
translations.de: Wir lassen die Schüler nicht hinaus.
translations.ru: Мы не выпускаем учеников на улицу.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không cho học sinh ra ngoài.
translations.nl: We laten de leerlingen niet naar buiten.
translations.hi: हम छात्रों को बाहर नहीं जाने देते हैं.
translations.el: Δεν αφήνουμε τους μαθητές να βγουν έξω.
translations.nb: Vi lar ikke elevene gå ut.
translations.id: Kami tidak membiarkan para siswa keluar.
translations.sv: Vi låter inte eleverna gå ut.
translations.ro: Nu îi lăsăm pe elevi să iasă.
translations.da: Vi lader ikke eleverne gå ud.
translations.ja: 私たちは生徒たちを外に出さない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'élèves'.
Common noun, plural; direct object (people being deprived).
Preposition introducing the complement denoting the thing withheld.
Common noun; complement of 'de' (what is withheld).
